diff --git a/src/main.rs b/src/main.rs
index 1234567..abcdefg 100644
--- a/src/main.rs
+++ b/src/main.rs
@@ -1,25 +1,30 @@
 use std::io::{self, Read};
 use std::fs;
 use std::path::Path;

+use crate::config::Config;
+use crate::logger::Logger;
+
 fn main() {
     let x = 5;
-    println!("Hello, world!");
+    println!("Hello, Rust!");
     let y = x + 1;

     if y > 5 {
-        println!("y is greater than 5");
+        println!("y is greater than 5!");
+        println!("Processing...");
     } else {
         println!("y is not greater than 5");
     }
+    println!("Done!");

     // Read file contents
     let file_content = fs::read_to_string("input.txt")
         .expect("Failed to read file");

     println!("File contains {} bytes", file_content.len());
 }

 fn process_data(data: &str) -> Vec<String> {
-    data.split_whitespace().map(|s| s.to_string()).collect()
+    data.split_whitespace().map(|s| s.trim().to_string()).collect()
 }

 name = "hello"

+version = "0.2.0"
+edition = "2021"
+
+[dependencies]
+serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
+tokio = { version = "1.0", features = ["full"] }
diff --git a/src/lib.rs b/src/lib.rs
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..1234567
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/lib.rs
@@ -0,0 +1,50 @@
+pub mod api;
+pub mod config;
+pub mod db;
+pub mod logger;
+pub mod utils;
+pub mod services;
+
+pub use api::{Server, start_server};
+pub use config::Config;
+pub use logger::Logger;
+
+pub fn version() -> &'static str {
+    env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION")
+}
+
+#[cfg(test)]
+mod tests {
+    use super::*;
+
+    #[test]
+    fn test_version() {
+        assert!(!version().is_empty());
+    }
+}
+diff --git a/src/config.rs b/src/config.rs
+index 5555555..6666666 100644
+--- a/src/config.rs
++++ b/src/config.rs
+@@ -1,20 +1,28 @@
+ use std::env;
+ use std::path::Path;
+
+-pub struct Config {
++pub struct Config {
+     pub db_url: String,
+     pub api_key: String,
+     pub port: u16,
++    pub timeout: u32,
++    pub max_connections: usize,
+ }
+
+ impl Config {
+-    pub fn from_env() -> Result<Self, String> {
++    pub fn from_env() -> Result<Self, ConfigError> {
+         let db_url = env::var("DATABASE_URL")
+-            .map_err(|_| "DATABASE_URL not set")?;
++            .map_err(|_| ConfigError::MissingVar("DATABASE_URL"))?;
+
+         let api_key = env::var("API_KEY")
+-            .map_err(|_| "API_KEY not set")?;
++            .map_err(|_| ConfigError::MissingVar("API_KEY"))?;
+
+         let port = env::var("PORT")
+-            .unwrap_or_else(|_| "8080".to_string())
++            .unwrap_or_else(|_| "3000".to_string())
+             .parse::<u16>()
+-            .map_err(|_| "PORT must be a number")?;
++            .map_err(|_| ConfigError::InvalidPort)?;
++
++        let timeout = env::var("TIMEOUT").unwrap_or("30".to_string())
++            .parse::<u32>()
++            .map_err(|_| ConfigError::InvalidTimeout)?;
+
+         Ok(Config {
+             db_url,
+             api_key,
+             port,
++            timeout,
++            max_connections: 100,
+         })
+     }
+ }
+diff --git a/src/logger.rs b/src/logger.rs
+index 7777777..8888888 100644
+--- a/src/logger.rs
++++ b/src/logger.rs
+@@ -1,15 +1,25 @@
+ use std::fs::File;
+ use std::io::Write;
++use chrono::Local;
+
+ pub struct Logger {
+     file: Option<File>,
++    level: LogLevel,
+ }
+
++pub enum LogLevel {
++    Debug,
++    Info,
++    Warn,
++    Error,
++}
++
+ impl Logger {
+-    pub fn new(file_path: &str) -> Result<Self, std::io::Error> {
++    pub fn new(file_path: &str, level: LogLevel) -> Result<Self, std::io::Error> {
+         let file = File::create(file_path)?;
+         Ok(Logger {
+             file: Some(file),
++            level,
+         })
+     }
+
+-    pub fn log(&mut self, message: &str) -> Result<(), std::io::Error> {
++    pub fn log(&mut self, message: &str) -> Result<(), std::io::Error> {
++        let timestamp = Local::now().format("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S");
+         if let Some(ref mut f) = self.file {
+-            writeln!(f, "{}", message)?;
++            writeln!(f, "[{}] {}", timestamp, message)?;
+         }
+         Ok(())
+     }
+}
